option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value: <resources> <string name="app_name">Cresto</string> <string name="all_todos">All Todos</string> <string name="mind_flow">Mind Flow</string> <string name="settings">Settings</string> <string name="cancel">Cancel</string> <string name="delete">Delete</string> <string name="filter_default">Default</string> <string name="due_date">Due Date</string> <string name="flag">Flag</string> <string name="title">Title</string> <string name="completed">Completed</string> <string name="expand">Expand</string> <string name="selected_todos">%1$d Selected</string> <string name="search_all_todos">Search all todos</string> <string name="filter">Filter</string> <string name="add_new_todo">Add new todo</string> <string name="delete_selected_todo_s">Delete selected todo(s)</string> <string name="exit_selection_mode">Exit selection mode</string> <string name="ai" translatable="false">AI</string> <string name="appearance">Appearance</string> <string name="data_storage"><![CDATA[Data & Storage]]></string> <string name="general">General</string> <string name="credits">Credits</string> <string name="credits_info">Cresto is built with the help of these amazing open-source libraries.</string> <string name="developer">Developer</string> <string name="developer_avatar">Developer Avatar</string> <string name="main_developer">Main Developer</string> <string name="designer">Designer</string> <string name="enter_icon">Enter icon</string> <string name="overscroll_animation_developer">Overscroll Animation Developer</string> <string name="version_info">Version Info</string> <string name="version_name">Version name</string> <string name="version_code">Version Code</string> <string name="about">About</string> <string name="back">Back</string> <string name="manage_startup_behavior_todo_marking_and_advanced_shortcuts">Manage startup behavior, todo markers, and advanced shortcuts.</string> <string name="general_section_title">General</string> <string name="check_for_updates_on_startup">Check for Updates on Startup</string> <string name="completion_sound">Play Sound on Completing Todo</string> <string name="language">Language</string> <string name="chinese">Chinese</string> <string name="todos">Todos</string> <string name="auto_add_to_system_calendar">Auto-add to System Calendar</string> <string name="automatically_add_new_todos_as_events_in_system_calendar">Automatically add new todos as events in the system calendar.</string> <string name="due_today_marker">Due Today Marker</string> <string name="add_a_marker_to_todos_due_today">Add a marker to todos due today.</string> <string name="overdue_marker">Overdue Marker</string> <string name="add_a_marker_to_overdue_todos_on_the_next_day">Add a marker to overdue todos on the next day.</string> <string name="advanced">Advanced</string> <string name="shizuku_permission">Shizuku Permission</string> <string name="enable_extract_screen_quick_toggle">Enable "Extract Screen" Quick Toggle</string> <string name="add_a_quick_toggle_to_control_center_for_one_tap_ai_screen_extraction_shizuku_required">Add a quick toggle to Control Center for one-tap AI screen extraction. Shizuku permission is required.</string> <string name="boost_your_experience_with_intelligent_cresto_function_calling">Boost your experience with intelligent Cresto function calling.</string> <string name="api" translatable="false">API</string> <string name="api_key" translatable="false">API Key</string> <string name="url" translatable="false">URL</string> <string name="text_processing_model">Text Processing Model</string> <string name="multimodal_model">Multimodal Model</string> <string name="model" translatable="false">Model</string> <string name="save">Save</string> <string name="save_settings">Save Settings</string> <string name="saved">Saved</string> <string name="test">Test</string> <string name="input">Input</string> <string name="response">Response</string> <string name="craft_your_unique_style_with_a_few_adorable_tweaks">Craft your unique style with a few adorable tweaks.</string> <string name="color">Color</string> <string name="custom_primary_color">Custom Primary Color</string> <string name="use_dynamic_color_scheme">Use Dynamic Color Scheme</string> <string name="lite_mode">Lite Mode</string> <string name="design">Design</string> <string name="liquid_glass" translatable="false">Liquid Glass</string> <string name="clear">Clear</string> <string name="reset">Reset</string> <string name="manage_your_application_s_storage_footprint">Manage your application\'s storage footprint.</string> <string name="storage_usage">Storage Usage</string> <string name="app_size">App Size</string> <string name="user_data">User Data</string> <string name="cache">Cache</string> <string name="total">Total</string> <string name="export_database">Export Backup File</string> <string name="import_database">Import Backup File</string> <string name="reset_all_settings">Reset All Settings</string> <string name="this_will_reset_all_settings_to_their_defaults_your_todos_will_not_be_deleted">This will reset all settings to their defaults. Your todos will not be deleted.</string> <string name="clear_all_data">Clear All Data</string> <string name="this_will_permanently_delete_all_application_data_including_todos_and_settings_this_action_cannot_be_undone">This will permanently delete all application data, including todos and settings. This action cannot be undone.</string> <string name="light_mode_image">Light Mode Image</string> <string name="light_mode">Light</string> <string name="dark_mode_image">Dark Mode Image</string> <string name="dark_mode">Dark</string> <string name="automatic">Automatic</string> <string name="custom">Custom</string> <string name="done">Done</string> <string name="none">None</string> <string name="today">Today</string> <string name="due_today_text">Due today</string> <string name="overdue_with_date">Overdue - %1$s</string> <string name="tomorrow">Tomorrow</string> <string name="next_week">Next Week</string> <string name="new_todo">New Todo</string> <string name="ok">OK</string> <string name="error">Error</string> <string name="extract_from_text">Extract from text…</string> <string name="extract">Extract</string> <string name="extract_from_image">Extract from image</string> <string name="extracting">Extracting…</string> <string name="task">Task</string> <string name="detail">Detail</string> <string name="created">Created %1$s</string> <string name="delete_current_todo">Delete current todo?</string> <string name="just_now">just now</string> <string name="yesterday">yesterday</string> <plurals name="minutes_ago"> <item quantity="one">%d minute ago</item> <item quantity="other">%d minutes ago</item> </plurals> <plurals name="hours_ago"> <item quantity="one">%d hour ago</item> <item quantity="other">%d hours ago</item> </plurals> <plurals name="delete_todo_dialog_title"> <item quantity="one">Delete %d todo?</item> <item quantity="other">Delete %d todos?</item> </plurals> <plurals name="delete_todo_dialog_msg"> <item quantity="one">This will delete the selected todo permanently. This action cannot be undone.</item> <item quantity="other">This will delete the selected todos permanently. This action cannot be undone.</item> </plurals> <plurals name="delete_todo_with_subtasks"> <item quantity="one">This will delete current todo and its task permanently. This action cannot be undone.</item> <item quantity="other">This will delete current todo and its tasks permanently. This action cannot be undone.</item> </plurals> <string name="delete_todo_simple">This will delete current todo permanently. This action cannot be undone.</string> <string name="add_task">Add task</string> <string name="app_icon">App Icon</string> <string name="developed_by_nevoit">Developed by Nevoit</string> <string name="config_entry">%1$s config entry</string> <string name="version">Version</string> <string name="today_stat">Today</string> <string name="statistics">Statistics</string> <string name="min">%1$d min</string> <string name="start">Start</string> <string name="stopwatch">Stopwatch</string> <string name="in_progress_timer">In Progress</string> <string name="counting_up">Counting Up</string> <string name="paused">Paused</string> <string name="finished">Finished</string> <string name="brain_dump">Brain Dump</string> <string name="welcome_to_cresto">Welcome to Cresto</string> <string name="introduction_title_1">Minimalist To-Do</string> <string name="introduction_1">A clean, distraction-free interface to plan your day and track progress at a glance.</string> <string name="introduction_title_2">Smart Capture</string> <string name="introduction_2">Instantly turn screenshots into tasks. Effortless information gathering, powered by AI.</string> <string name="introduction_title_3">Focus & Timers</string> <string name="introduction_3">One-tap Pomodoro and countdowns. Stay in the zone and master your rhythm.</string> <string name="cresto_can_do">Cresto Can Do</string> <string name="ascending">Ascending</string> <string name="descending">Descending</string> <string name="when_use_dynamic_color_scheme_is_enabled_custom_primary_color_is_automatically_turned_off">When \"Use dynamic color scheme\" is enabled, \"Custom primary color\" is automatically turned off.</string> <string name="enabling_liquid_glass_can_significantly_impact_performance">Enabling \"Liquid Glass\" can significantly impact performance.</string> <string name="enabling_lite_mode_will_disable_some_blur_effects">Enabling \"Lite Mode\" will disable some blur effects.</string> <string name="select_all">Select all</string> <string name="more">More</string> <string name="check_all">Complete selected</string> <string name="set_flag">Set flag</string> <string name="duplicate_todo">Duplicate</string> <string name="merge_todos">Merge todos</string> <string name="link_main_todo">Link main todo</string> <string name="share">Share</string> <string name="new_merged_todo_title">New Todo</string> <string name="flag_red">Red</string> <string name="flag_orange">Orange</string> <string name="flag_yellow">Yellow</string> <string name="flag_green">Green</string> <string name="flag_blue">Blue</string> <string name="flag_purple">Purple</string> <string name="flag_gray">Gray</string> <string name="add_to_calendar">Add to calendar</string> <string name="skip_duplicates">Skip Duplicates</string> <string name="import_all">Import All</string> <string name="export_failed">Export Failed</string> <string name="import_failed">Import Failed</string> <string name="calculating">Calculating…</string> <string name="backup_export_stream_error">Open output stream failed.</string> <string name="backup_read_file_error">Can not read backup file.</string> <string name="backup_json_only_hint">Please select a .json backup file.</string> <string name="backup_duplicate_detected_title">Detected %1$d Duplicate Items</string> <string name="backup_duplicate_detected_message">Total %1$d items, %2$d new. Choose import mode.</string> <string name="backup_precheck_failed">Precheck Failed</string> <string name="backup_import_completed">Import Completed</string> <string name="backup_import_result_message">Total %1$d items, imported %2$d, skipped %3$d.</string> <string name="confirm_action_title">%1$s?</string> <string name="sort">Sort</string> <string name="select_due_date">Select Due Date</string> <string name="calendar_view">Calendar View</string> <string name="no_task_this_day">No task this day</string> <string name="take_a_break">Take a break</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <resources> <string name="app_name">Cresto</string> <string name="all_todos">All Todos</string> <string name="mind_flow">Mind Flow</string> <string name="settings">Settings</string> <string name="cancel">Cancel</string> <string name="delete">Delete</string> <string name="filter_default">Default</string> <string name="due_date">Due Date</string> <string name="flag">Flag</string> todo(s)</string> <string name="exit_selection_mode">Exit selection mode</string> <string name="ai" translatable="false">AI</string> <string name="appearance">Appearance</string> <string name="data_storage"><![CDATA[Data & Storage]]></string> <string name="general">General</string> <string name="credits">Credits</string> <string name="credits_info">Cresto is built with the help of these amazing open-source libraries.</string> <string name="developer">Developer</string> <string name="developer_avatar">Developer Avatar</string> <string name="main_developer">Main Developer</string> <string name="designer">Designer</string> <string name="enter_icon">Enter icon</string> <string name="overscroll_animation_developer">Overscroll Animation Developer</string> <string name="back">Back</string> <string name="manage_startup_behavior_todo_marking_and_advanced_shortcuts">Manage startup behavior, todo markers, and advanced shortcuts.</string> <string name="general_section_title">General</string> <string name="check_for_updates_on_startup">Check for Updates on Startup</string> <string name="completion_sound">Play Sound on Completing Todo</string> <string name="language">Language</string> <string name="chinese">Chinese</string> <string name="todos">Todos</string> <string name="auto_add_to_system_calendar">Auto-add to System Calendar</string> <string name="automatically_add_new_todos_as_events_in_system_calendar">Automatically add new todos as events in the system calendar.</string> <string name="due_today_marker">Due Today Marker</string> <string name="add_a_marker_to_todos_due_today">Add a marker to todos due today.</string> <string name="overdue_marker">Overdue Marker</string> <string name="add_a_marker_to_overdue_todos_on_the_next_day">Add a marker to overdue todos on the next day.</string> <string name="advanced">Advanced</string> <string name="shizuku_permission">Shizuku Permission</string> <string name="enable_extract_screen_quick_toggle">Enable "Extract Screen" Quick Toggle</string> <string name="add_a_quick_toggle_to_control_center_for_one_tap_ai_screen_extraction_shizuku_required">Add a quick toggle to Control Center for one-tap AI screen extraction. Shizuku permission is required.</string> <string name="boost_your_experience_with_intelligent_cresto_function_calling">Boost your experience with intelligent Cresto function calling.</string> <string name="api" translatable="false">API</string> <string name="api_key" translatable="false">API Key</string> <string name="url" translatable="false">URL</string> <string name="text_processing_model">Text Processing Model</string> <string name="multimodal_model">Multimodal Model</string> <string name="model" translatable="false">Model</string> <string name="save">Save</string> <string name="save_settings">Save Settings</string> <string name="saved">Saved</string> <string name="test">Test</string> <string name="input">Input</string> <string name="response">Response</string> <string name="craft_your_unique_style_with_a_few_adorable_tweaks">Craft your unique style with a few adorable tweaks.</string> <string name="color">Color</string> <string name="custom_primary_color">Custom Primary Color</string> <string name="use_dynamic_color_scheme">Use Dynamic Color Scheme</string> <string name="lite_mode">Lite Mode</string> <string name="design">Design</string> <string name="liquid_glass" translatable="false">Liquid Glass</string> <string name="clear">Clear</string> <string name="reset">Reset</string> <string name="manage_your_application_s_storage_footprint">Manage your application\'s storage footprint.</string> <string name="storage_usage">Storage Usage</string> <string name="app_size">App Size</string> <string name="user_data">User Data</string> <string name="cache">Cache</string> <string name="total">Total</string> <string name="export_database">Export Backup File</string> <string name="import_database">Import Backup File</string> <string name="reset_all_settings">Reset All Settings</string> <string name="this_will_reset_all_settings_to_their_defaults_your_todos_will_not_be_deleted">This will reset all settings to their defaults. Your todos will not be deleted.</string> <string name="clear_all_data">Clear All Data</string> <string name="this_will_permanently_delete_all_application_data_including_todos_and_settings_this_action_cannot_be_undone">This will permanently delete all application data, including todos and settings. This action cannot be undone.</string> <string name="light_mode_image">Light Mode Image</string> <string name="light_mode">Light</string> <string name="dark_mode_image">Dark Mode Image</string> <string name="dark_mode">Dark</string> <string name="automatic">Automatic</string> <string name="custom">Custom</string> <string name="done">Done</string> <string name="none">None</string> <string name="today">Today</string> <string name="due_today_text">Due today</string> <string name="overdue_with_date">Overdue - %1$s</string> <string name="tomorrow">Tomorrow</string> <string name="next_week">Next Week</string> <string name="new_todo">New Todo</string> <string name="ok">OK</string> <string name="error">Error</string> <string name="extract_from_text">Extract from text…</string> <string name="extract">Extract</string> <string name="extract_from_image">Extract from image</string> <string name="extracting">Extracting…</string> <string name="task">Task</string> <string name="detail">Detail</string> <string name="created">Created %1$s</string> <string name="delete_current_todo">Delete current todo?</string> <string name="just_now">just now</string> <string name="yesterday">yesterday</string> <plurals name="minutes_ago"> <item quantity="one">%d minute ago</item> <item quantity="other">%d minutes ago</item> </plurals> <plurals name="hours_ago"> <item quantity="one">%d hour ago</item> <item quantity="other">%d hours ago</item> </plurals> <plurals name="delete_todo_dialog_title"> <item quantity="one">Delete %d todo?</item> <item quantity="other">Delete %d todos?</item> </plurals> <plurals name="delete_todo_dialog_msg"> <item quantity="one">This will delete the selected todo permanently. This action cannot be undone.</item> <item quantity="other">This will delete the selected todos permanently. This action cannot be undone.</item> </plurals> <plurals name="delete_todo_with_subtasks"> <item quantity="one">This will delete current todo and its task permanently. This action cannot be undone.</item> <item quantity="other">This will delete current todo and its tasks permanently. This action cannot be undone.</item> </plurals> <string name="delete_todo_simple">This will delete current todo permanently. This action cannot be undone.</string> <string name="add_task">Add task</string> <string name="app_icon">App Icon</string> <string name="developed_by_nevoit">Developed by Nevoit</string> <string name="config_entry">%1$s config entry</string> <string name="version">Version</string> <string name="today_stat">Today</string> <string name="statistics">Statistics</string> <string name="min">%1$d min</string> <string name="start">Start</string> <string name="stopwatch">Stopwatch</string> <string name="in_progress_timer">In Progress</string> <string name="counting_up">Counting Up</string> <string name="paused">Paused</string> <string name="finished">Finished</string> <string name="brain_dump">Brain Dump</string> <string name="welcome_to_cresto">Welcome to Cresto</string> <string name="introduction_title_1">Minimalist To-Do</string> <string name="introduction_1">A clean, distraction-free interface to plan your day and track progress at a glance.</string> <string name="introduction_title_2">Smart Capture</string> <string name="introduction_2">Instantly turn screenshots into tasks. Effortless information gathering, powered by AI.</string> <string name="introduction_title_3">Focus & Timers</string> <string name="introduction_3">One-tap Pomodoro and countdowns. Stay in the zone and master your rhythm.</string> <string name="cresto_can_do">Cresto Can Do</string> <string name="ascending">Ascending</string> <string name="descending">Descending</string> <string name="when_use_dynamic_color_scheme_is_enabled_custom_primary_color_is_automatically_turned_off">When \"Use dynamic color scheme\" is enabled, \"Custom primary color\" is automatically turned off.</string> <string name="enabling_liquid_glass_can_significantly_impact_performance">Enabling \"Liquid Glass\" can significantly impact performance.</string> <string name="enabling_lite_mode_will_disable_some_blur_effects">Enabling \"Lite Mode\" will disable some blur effects.</string> <string name="select_all">Select all</string> <string name="more">More</string> <string name="check_all">Complete selected</string> <string name="set_flag">Set flag</string> <string name="duplicate_todo">Duplicate</string> <string name="merge_todos">Merge todos</string> <string name="link_main_todo">Link main todo</string> <string name="share">Share</string> <string name="new_merged_todo_title">New Todo</string> <string name="flag_red">Red</string> <string name="flag_orange">Orange</string> <string name="flag_yellow">Yellow</string> <string name="flag_green">Green</string> <string name="flag_blue">Blue</string> <string name="flag_purple">Purple</string> <string name="flag_gray">Gray</string> <string name="add_to_calendar">Add to calendar</string> <string name="skip_duplicates">Skip Duplicates</string> <string name="import_all">Import All</string> <string name="export_failed">Export Failed</string> <string name="import_failed">Import Failed</string> <string name="calculating">Calculating…</string> <string name="backup_export_stream_error">Open output stream failed.</string> <string name="backup_read_file_error">Can not read backup file.</string> <string name="backup_json_only_hint">Please select a .json backup file.</string> <string name="backup_duplicate_detected_title">Detected %1$d Duplicate Items</string> <string name="backup_duplicate_detected_message">Total %1$d items, %2$d new. Choose import mode.</string> <string name="backup_precheck_failed">Precheck Failed</string> <string name="backup_import_completed">Import Completed</string> <string name="backup_import_result_message">Total %1$d items, imported %2$d, skipped %3$d.</string> <string name="confirm_action_title">%1$s?</string> <string name="sort">Sort</string> <string name="select_due_date">Select Due Date</string> <string name="calendar_view">Calendar View</string> <string name="no_task_this_day">No task this day</string> <string name="take_a_break">Take a break</string> <string name="quick_return_to_today">Tap here to quickly return to today</string> </resources>
